code_value: Thank you to all the competitors. I know you want to hear the results. It was a very difficult decision, and I'll start with the team in the fourth place, the Sunshine Team. They are the youngest group here today. But unluckily, the violin was so quiet that we couldn't hear it clearly. In the third place is Eastside. They are such good dancers that they should enter a dance competition. In second place is the Star. They did well, especially the young man who played the guitar! Congratulations to the Storm, our winners today. The lead singer had such a great voice that we had to give them first place. Well done!

你将听到达人秀主持人公布表演比赛结果的短文，录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中的正确的信息（二选一），在50秒钟内说一段话介绍达人秀的比赛结果（包含四个要点的内容）。
